channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Shooting Stars secure CAF Confederation Cup spot after 27 years away from continental football
item.description: Shooting Stars Sports Club (3SC) have finally secured a return to continental football after finishing third in the 2025/26 Nigeria Premier Football League season, ending a long 27-year absence. Despi...

item.title: A Look Back at Edwige Fenech’s Influence on 1970s Italian Cinema
item.description: The article published by Vintage Everyday celebrates the career and enduring legacy of Edwige Fenech, one of the most recognizable actresses in European cinema during the 1970s. Born in France and lat...

item.title: California authorities investigate animal rescue after dead dogs were discovered buried on property
item.description: Authorities in Northern California are investigating serious allegations of animal cruelty involving Miranda’s Rescue, an animal shelter based in Fortuna, Humboldt County. The investigation began afte...

item.title: Experts call for major reforms to reduce infrastructure cost blowouts in Australia
item.description: Australia continues to struggle with delivering major infrastructure projects on time and within budget, according to the article by Dominic D Ahiaga-Dagbui. The piece argues that repeated cost overru...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli secures fourth consecutive Formula 1 win after dramatic Canadian Grand Prix battle
item.description: Mercedes driver Kimi Antonelli continued his remarkable start to the Formula 1 season by winning the Canadian Grand Prix in Montreal, marking his fourth consecutive victory of the year. The 19-year-ol...

item.title: Poverty and weak schooling push Araria families in Bihar to send children to distant madrasas
item.description: The report highlights how extreme poverty, poor schooling infrastructure, and repeated natural hardships in Bihar’s Araria district are pushing families to send their children to madrasas located hund...

item.title: FRSC Sends 950 Personnel, Ambulances and Patrol Vehicles Across Kwara for Eid-El-Kabir Traffic Operations
item.description: The Federal Road Safety Corps (FRSC) Kwara State Sector Command don deploy 950 officers, marshals, special marshals and emergency responders across the state to maintain road safety and smooth traffic...

item.title: West Bengal to establish district-wise holding centres for illegal immigrants awaiting deportation
item.description: The West Bengal government has initiated plans to set up 'holding centres' in all 23 districts to accommodate illegal immigrants, including Bangladeshi, Rohingya, and other foreign nationals, who are ...

item.title: Ontario Liberal arbitration upholds Scarborough Southwest nomination result after appeal by Nate Erskine-Smith is dismissed
item.description: Liberal MP Nate Erskine-Smith has lost his appeal challenging the results of the Ontario Liberal nomination contest in the Scarborough Southwest riding of Toronto, further complicating his potential t...

item.title: Officials detect possible crack in Garden Grove chemical tank amid ongoing evacuation crisis
item.description: Emergency officials in Garden Grove, California, are continuing efforts to stabilize a hazardous chemical incident at a GKN Aerospace facility that has forced the evacuation of more than 40,000 reside...

item.title: 1950s Wedding Fashion and Traditions Captured in Vintage Photographs
item.description: The article explores what weddings looked like in the 1950s, highlighting the era’s strong sense of tradition, etiquette, and post-war elegance. It describes how weddings during this decade were highl...

item.title: South Korea showcases submarines in British Columbia as it competes for Canada’s naval procurement contract
item.description: South Korea is actively promoting its bid to supply Canada with new submarines by showcasing its naval capabilities in Victoria, British Columbia. Two South Korean warships, including a KSS-III-class ...

item.title: Comedian Laura Clery Survives After 600-Pound Refrigerator Falls on Her at Home with Children Present
item.description: Comedian Laura Clery, 39, shared a harrowing personal experience on Instagram, describing it as the most terrifying night of her life. While preparing for bed in her home, a 600-pound refrigerator sud...

item.title: Tax Justice SA urges mandatory jail terms after Limpopo illicit cigarette conviction
item.description: Tax Justice South Africa (TJSA) has called for stricter laws and harsher penalties against illicit cigarette trafficking following the sentencing of a 56-year-old foreign national to 13 years in priso...

item.title: Japan to Continue Security Assistance to the Philippines Amid West Philippine Sea Tensions
item.description: Japan will continue providing security assistance to the Philippines for the fourth consecutive year as both countries strengthen their defense cooperation amid growing tensions in the West Philippine...

item.title: Police confirm death of 15-year-old Declan Sawyer after search at Swanholme Lakes in Lincoln
item.description: Lincolnshire Police have confirmed that the body of 15-year-old Declan Sawyer was recovered from Swanholme Lakes, a nature reserve near Lincoln, after he disappeared while swimming on Sunday afternoon...

item.title: Azzi Fudd’s big third quarter leads Dallas Wings to win over New York Liberty
item.description: Azzi Fudd delivered a standout performance to help the Dallas Wings secure a 91-76 victory over the New York Liberty on Sunday, highlighted by a dominant third quarter that shifted the momentum of the...

item.title: Journalist claims health damage after alleged energy-weapon attacks linked to Epstein reporting
item.description: Veteran journalist Alisa Valdes-Rodriguez has publicly claimed that she has suffered lasting health damage following what she describes as targeted “direct energy weapon” attacks. According to her sta...

item.title: Six Bengaluru police personnel suspended after security lapse during PM Modi convoy route inspection
item.description: Six police personnel, including a sub-inspector, have been suspended in Bengaluru following a reported security lapse during Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to the Art of Living Foundation campus...

item.title: Agusan del Sur officially prepares to host Palarong Pambansa 2026 after decades-long bid
item.description: Agusan del Sur has finally achieved its long-time goal of hosting the Palarong Pambansa 2026, marking a historic milestone for the province after more than three decades of aspiration. The article hig...
